summary: Add rescore script to re-apply current scorer code against existing benchmark transcripts without re-running agent sessions
context: Scorer fixes (assumptionHandling, finalQuality, decisionConsistency, composite weights) only affect future runs by default since scores are baked into JSON files at run time. But raw transcripts contain all the data scorers need (toolCalls, fileChanges with diffs). Needed a way to apply new scorers to existing data.
rationale: The script reconstructs RawResults from session transcripts, pulls testResults from existing score files (not stored in transcripts), and runs the scenario scorer. Original scores backed up to .pre-rescore-backup/. This avoids re-running expensive agent sessions (~$165/run) just to test scorer changes.

alternatives.option: Only validate scorer fixes on future runs
alternatives.reason_rejected: Wastes existing data worth $165; user has budget constraints and wants to see impact now
